seoTitle: Anambah vs Ando — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Anambah and Ando. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Anambah and Ando.
heading: Anambah vs Ando — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Anambah, New South Wales and Ando, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ando has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Anambah (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Anambah or Ando safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Anambah has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Ando scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Anambah scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Ando scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Anambah or Ando?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ando has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
